title: Enhanced Loading Screens
description: A mod that allows you to add and use custom backgrounds on your Minecraft loading screens.
body:
# **Enhanced Loading Screens.**
**Enhanced Loading Screens** is a mod that allows you to use custom background images in some Minecraft Screens. 

## **Information:**

- Enhanced Loading Screens is a client-side mod.
- Feel free to upload background packs.
- Use **Enhanced Loading Screens** wherever you want.

My own els addon: [**Minecraft: At Night.**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/els-at-night)

## **World loading screen.**
![World Loading Screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd6da37f96dcea9e5fb1ea4fd3176ead8c4dfb3f.gif)
## **Adding backgrounds:**

First, create a resource pack.

Next, add your images to it, following the example below.

Don't forget that the images must be in .png format, and you can include a maximum of 12 images, any extra ones will not be loaded.

![File Structure Guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e6865a12a9807d70e5e282055a19b58a49bc813.png)

**Well, if you want to leave me a tip, https://ko-fi.com/mateusmg2010**

**Thanks for downloading :)**
